sentences.arabic: أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ مِنْ أَكْثَرِ الصَّحَابَةِ رِوَايَةً لِلْحَدِيثِ النَّبَوِيِّ، إِذْ بَلَغَتْ رِوَايَاتُهُ نَحْوَ خَمْسَةِ آلَافٍ وَثَلَاثِمِائَةِ حَدِيثٍ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Hurejre, radijallahu anhu, jedan je od ashaba koji je prenio najviše hadisa, a broj njegovih predaja iznosi oko pet hiljada i tristo hadisa.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Hurairah, may Allah be pleased with him, was among the Companions who narrated the most hadiths, with his narrations reaching approximately five thousand three hundred.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَسْلَمَ عَامَ خَيْبَرَ فِي السَّنَةِ السَّابِعَةِ لِلْهِجْرَةِ، غَيْرَ أَنَّهُ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ لَازَمَ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مُلَازَمَةً تَامَّةً وَأَوْلَى أَمْرَهُ كُلَّ وَقْتِهِ لِحِفْظِ السُّنَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Primio je islam u godini Hajbera, sedme godine po Hidžri, ali je neprekidno pratio Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, i sve svoje vrijeme posvetio pamćenju sunneta.
sentences.translationEn: He embraced Islam in the year of Khaybar, the seventh year after the Hijra, yet he devoted himself entirely to accompanying the Prophet, peace be upon him, and gave all his time to preserving the Sunnah.

sentences.arabic: وَكَانَ يُفَضِّلُ الشِّبَعَ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ عَلَى الشِّبَعِ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ، مُؤْثِرًا صُحْبَةَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَلَى كُلِّ مَتَاعِ الدُّنْيَا.
sentences.translation: Preferirao je sitost znanjem nad sitošću hranom, birajući društvo Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, nad svim svjetovnim dobrima.
sentences.translationEn: He preferred being full of knowledge over being full of food, choosing the companionship of the Prophet over all worldly comfort.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدِ اشْتُهِرَ بِذَاكِرَتِهِ الْقَوِيَّةِ الَّتِي دَعَا لَهُ بِهَا النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْعِلْمِ].
sentences.translation: Proslavio se iznimnim pamćenjem za koje mu je Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, uputio dovu [bilježi Buhari u Knjizi znanja].
sentences.translationEn: He became renowned for his strong memory, for which the Prophet, peace be upon him, supplicated on his behalf [recorded by al-Bukhari in the Book of Knowledge].

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ مَنَاقِبِهِ أَنَّهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَتَهَيَّبُ مِنْ نَشْرِ الْعِلْمِ وَتَعْلِيمِ النَّاسِ، حَتَّى غَدَا مَرْجِعًا كَبِيرًا لِلتَّابِعِينَ.
sentences.translation: Među njegovim odlikama je i to da se nije bojao širiti znanje i podučavati ljude, pa je postao veliki autoritet za tabi'ine.
sentences.translationEn: Among his virtues was his fearlessness in spreading knowledge and teaching people, until he became a great reference for the Tabi'un.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي سِيرَتِهِ دَرْسٌ لِكُلِّ طَالِبِ عِلْمٍ: إِنَّ الْإِخْلَاصَ وَالْمُثَابَرَةَ وَتَقْدِيمَ الْعِلْمِ عَلَى حُظُوظِ النَّفْسِ هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ إِلَى الْعِلْمِ النَّافِعِ.
sentences.translation: U njegovoj biografiji sadržana je pouka za svakog tražioca znanja: iskrenost, ustrajnost i prednost znanja nad ličnim interesima put je do korisnog znanja.
sentences.translationEn: His biography contains a lesson for every seeker of knowledge: sincerity, perseverance, and prioritising knowledge over personal desires is the path to beneficial knowledge.
